scientific_integrity.detail: This skill produces generated text or document outputs rather than empirical research findings, so scientific integrity review is not applicable.

practice_boundaries.detail: The skill operates within clinical/medical data processing scope and does not generate clinical or diagnostic decision outputs.

methodological_ground.detail: No experimental methodology claims are made; the skill generates deterministic generated text or document outputs without asserting scientific conclusions.

code_usability.detail: Any code produced by this skill is utility-oriented, not bioinformatics analysis code; research veto code review is not applicable.

functional_suitability.note: Covers simplification, compliance check, and readability reporting; original drafting and regulatory submission explicitly excluded. PHI check now enforced as step 1.

reliability.note: Error handling documented; PHI check step added; recoverability path present. Minor: no explicit retry or rollback for partial simplification.

performance_context.note: No progressive disclosure of reference files; all content in single SKILL.md.

agent_usability.note: Workflow clear with PHI check as step 1. Feedback design good via response template. Error prevention covers fabrication and scope. Input Validation redirect now includes specific alternative (IRB template library).

human_usability.note: Description is discoverable. Input Validation refusal now includes actionable next-step suggestion for out-of-scope requests.

security.note: PHI/PII detection step now enforced in workflow step 1 with mandatory warning. No credential handling needed. Input validation present.

maintainability.note: Clean single-file structure; modifiable; no test cases provided.

agent_specific.note: Trigger precision good; escape hatches present with actionable alternative in refusal; composability moderate — no documented output schema for downstream use.

key_strengths: PHI/PII detection step now enforced as step 1 in workflow — mandatory warning before processing any document containing patient identifiers
Out-of-scope refusal now includes specific actionable alternative (IRB template library or regulatory affairs specialist)
Comprehensive required-elements checklist (9 FDA/ICH-GCP elements) is explicitly enumerated and enforced
Error handling explicitly prohibits fabrication of compliance status — a critical safety property for this domain

recommendations.title: No test cases or example inputs provided for verification
recommendations.problem: The skill has no bundled example inputs or expected outputs, making it difficult to verify correct behavior after updates.
recommendations.root_cause: Testability was not addressed in the skill design; SKILL.md only provides usage CLI examples without expected output samples.
recommendations.fix: Add a small set of example inputs with expected simplified outputs and compliance check results to the scripts/ directory or a references/ file.

recommendations.title: No progressive disclosure of reference files
recommendations.problem: All content is in a single SKILL.md with no references/ directory, meaning the full skill content is always loaded into context even for simple requests.
recommendations.root_cause: No references/ directory was created for supplementary content like compliance checklists or simplification rule details.
recommendations.fix: Move the Required Consent Elements checklist and Simplification Rules to a references/compliance_checklist.md file and reference it from SKILL.md to reduce context load for simple requests.
